summary: Complete testing of Enterprise Portal User Management improvements. Backend: 9/9 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified working. Eye button opens modal, payment history shows real data (empty when no transactions), Spanish translation complete.
verified_features: Eye button (👁) exists in each user row in Gestión de Usuarios table - WORKING
Eye button opens Client Detail Modal - WORKING
Modal shows: user name, email, plan badge, status indicator - WORKING
Modal shows statistics: Eventos SOS, Alertas, Pagos counts - WORKING
Modal shows 'Historial de Transacciones' section - WORKING
Empty payment history shows 'No hay transacciones registradas' - WORKING
Payment history returns REAL transactions (not fake data) - WORKING
Spanish translation complete: Gestión de Usuarios, Empresarial, Activo, etc. - WORKING
Table headers in Spanish: Usuario, Plan, Estado, Dispositivo SOS, Fecha de Registro, Acciones - WORKING
Plan labels in Spanish: Empresarial, Gratuito, Familiar, Premium - WORKING
Status labels in Spanish: Activo, Inactivo - WORKING
Login page in Spanish: Portal Enterprise, Email corporativo, Contraseña, Acceder al Portal - WORKING
Navigation menu in Spanish: Panel Principal, Empleados, Gestión de Usuarios, Emergencias SOS, etc. - WORKING
critical_code_review_comments: Eye button correctly implemented with data-testid attributes for testing
Modal properly displays user statistics and payment history
Payment history endpoint searches multiple collections (payments, stripe_payments) for real transactions
Empty state message displayed correctly when no payments exist
Spanish translation is complete and consistent throughout the UI
context_for_next_testing_agent: User management improvements verified working. Eye button opens modal with user details and real payment history. Spanish translation complete. All data-testid attributes in place for automated testing. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_39_user_management.py.
